scripts.test:e2e: npm run build && firebase emulators:exec --config ../firebase.json --project demo-opti-job --only firestore,auth "node --test e2e/*.test.js"
scripts.test:e2e:critical: npm run build && firebase emulators:exec --config ../firebase.json --project demo-opti-job --only firestore,auth "node --test e2e/p2_candidate_company_flows.test.js e2e/p3_ats_knockout_hardening.test.js e2e/p3_interviews_actions_callables.test.js e2e/p3_interviews_start_meeting_callable.test.js e2e/p3_compliance_observability.test.js e2e/p3_compliance_salary_benchmark.test.js"
